    A

    appendDigit(char) - Method in class main.RestockPanel
    Appends a digit to the typed quantity, up to 4 digits long.

    B

    backspacePressed - Variable in class main.KeyHandler
     
    boostPressed - Variable in class main.KeyHandler
     

    C

    canCook() - Method in class main.Cook
    Checks if the player has the necessary ingredients to cook the item
    cars - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    cars - Variable in class main.OrderBoard
     
    carsIndex - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    cChecker - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    checkEntityCollision(Entity, Entity[]) - Method in class main.CollisionChecker
    Checks for collision between entities, used for entities so they don't walk through each other.
    checkInteriorTile(int, int, String, int) - Method in class main.CollisionChecker
    Checks for collision with interior tiles (stall or truck), reads from the currently loaded interior map.
    checkTile(Entity) - Method in class main.CollisionChecker
    Checks for collision with player and world tiles, like trees, rock, walls, etc.
    clearCurrentInterior() - Method in class main.tile.TileManager
    Clears any currently loaded interior and resets the last-handled markers.
    collision - Variable in class main.tile.Tile
     
    CollisionChecker - Class in main
     
    CollisionChecker(Gamepanel) - Constructor for class main.CollisionChecker
    Constructor for CollisionChecker, used in Gameplanel to check for collisions between every entity and the world tiles, stall tiles and other entities.
    confirmTransfer() - Method in class main.RestockPanel
    Confirms the transfer of the typed quantity of items from the stall to the player.
    contactStall - Static variable in class main.CollisionChecker
     
    contactTruck - Static variable in class main.CollisionChecker
     
    Cook - Class in main
     
    Cook(String, Gamepanel) - Constructor for class main.Cook
    Constructor for the Cook class, initializes the cook time based on the item being cooked and the player's cook level, as well as the inventory indices for the food and its ingredients
    cooking - Static variable in class main.Cook
     
    cookingStartTime - Static variable in class main.Cook
     
    cookTime - Variable in class main.Cook
     
    countCustomerOutsideTruck(String) - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Counts the number of customers outside a specific truck.
    countCustomersOutsideStall(String) - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Counts the number of customers outside a specific stall.
    Current_level - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    currentCookItem - Static variable in class main.Cook
     
    currentCookTime - Static variable in class main.Cook
     
    currentStallType - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    customerCheckTile(Entity) - Method in class main.CollisionChecker
    Checks for collision between a customer and the stall tiles, used to check if the customer is touching the stall to decide whether to start moving towards the order board or not.
    customers - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    customers - Variable in class main.OrderBoard
     
    customersIndex - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     

    D

    deleteDigit() - Method in class main.RestockPanel
    Deletes the last digit from the typed quantity.
    doorX - Variable in class main.tile.TileManager
     
    doorY - Variable in class main.tile.TileManager
     
    downArrow - Variable in class main.KeyHandler
     
    downPressed - Variable in class main.KeyHandler
     
    draw(Graphics2D) - Method in class main.InformationPanel
    Draws the information panel on the screen.
    draw(Graphics2D) - Method in class main.InventoryPanel
    Draws the inventory panel on the screen.
    draw(Graphics2D) - Method in class main.RestockPanel
    Draws the restock panel on the screen if it is visible.
    draw(Graphics2D) - Method in class main.tile.TileManager
     
    drawCarOrder(Graphics2D) - Method in class main.OrderBoard
    Draws the car orders on the screen if the order board is visible.
    drawCustomerOrder(Graphics2D) - Method in class main.OrderBoard
    Draws the order board on the screen if it is visible.
    drawInterior(Graphics2D) - Method in class main.tile.TileManager
     

    E

    enterPressed - Variable in class main.KeyHandler
     

    F

    foodIndex - Variable in class main.Cook
     
    fulfillFirst() - Method in class main.OrderBoard
    Fulfills the first available item from the waiting customers.
    fulfillPressed - Variable in class main.KeyHandler
     

    G

    Gamepanel - Class in main
     
    Gamepanel() - Constructor for class main.Gamepanel
    Constructor for the Gamepanel class, initializes the game panel and its components.
    gameState - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    getCarForOrder(OrderList) - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Retrieves the car associated with a specific order.
    getCurrentInteriorMap() - Method in class main.tile.TileManager
     
    getCustomerContactStall(Entity) - Method in class main.CollisionChecker
    Checks for collision between entities, used for player and customers so they don't walk through each other.
    getCustomerContactTruck(Entity) - Method in class main.CollisionChecker
    Checks for collision between a customer and the truck tiles, used to check if the customer is touching the truck to decide whether to start moving towards the order board or not in level 2.
    getCustomerForOrder(OrderList) - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Retrieves the customer associated with a specific order.
    getFirstWaitingCar() - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Returns the first waiting car at a specific truck.
    getFirstWaitingCustomerStall(String) - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Returns the first waiting customer at a specific stall.
    getFirstWaitingCustomerTruck(String) - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Returns the first waiting customer at a specific truck.
    giveFood() - Method in class main.OrderList
    Gives food, one item from the order list.
    giveMoneyToPlayer(double) - Static method in class main.Inventory
    Method to giving a certian amount of money to the player, used to giove money when giving food to customer.
    giveToPlayer(int, int) - Static method in class main.Inventory
    Gives items to the players inventory based on index, like raw meat is 0, buns are 1, etc.

    image - Variable in class main.tile.Tile
     
    informationPanel - Variable in class main.Gamepanel

    inventory - Variable in class main.Gamepanel

    Constructor method for inventory class, initializes the stall 1000 of each item and player inventory to 0.

    inventoryPanel - Variable in class main.Gamepanel

    K

    keyH - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    KeyHandler - Class in main
     
    KeyHandler() - Constructor for class main.KeyHandler
     
    keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class main.KeyHandler
    Handles key pressed events, updating the state of various boolean flags based on which keys are pressed.
    keyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class main.KeyHandler
    Handles key released events, updating the state of various boolean flags based on which keys are released.
    keyTyped(KeyEvent) - Method in class main.KeyHandler
    Handles key typed events.

    Loads the order board with the current customers waiting at a specific stall.
    loadInterior() - Method in class main.tile.TileManager
     

    M

    main - package main
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class main.Main
    Main method start the game, it create a JFrame window, sets it size and properties then it creates an instance of Gamepanel, adds it to the window, and starts the game thread for the main game loop
    Main - Class in main
     
    Main() - Constructor for class main.Main
     
    main.tile - package main.tile
     
    mapTileNum - Variable in class main.tile.TileManager
     
    maxScreenCol - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    maxScreenRow - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    maxWorldCol - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    maxWorldRow - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    message - Static variable in class main.Messages
     
    messages - Variable in class main.Gamepanel

    Messages(String) - Constructor for class main.Messages
    Initializes the messages panel with the given message.
    moneyGiven - Static variable in class main.Inventory
     
    moveSelection(int) - Method in class main.InventoryPanel
    Moves the selection up or down through the inventory items.
    moveSelection(int) - Method in class main.RestockPanel
    Moves the selection up or down through the buyable item list.

    O

    orderBoard - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    OrderBoard - Class in main
     
    OrderBoard(Gamepanel) - Constructor for class main.OrderBoard
    Constructor for the OrderBoard class, which initializes the game panel.
    OrderList - Class in main
     
    OrderList(int, String) - Constructor for class main.OrderList
    Initializes the order list with a random selection of items based on the current level and stall type.

    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Paints the game components on the screen.

    Initializes the restock panel with the given inventory.
    restockStationItems - Static variable in class main.Inventory

    run() - Method in class main.Gamepanel

    S

    screenHeight - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    screenWidth - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    selectCurrentItem() - Method in class main.RestockPanel
    Selects the current item and activates typing mode.
    setLines(String...) - Method in class main.InformationPanel
    Sets the lines of text to be displayed in the information panel.
    setLines(List) - Method in class main.InformationPanel
    Sets the lines of text to be displayed in the information panel.
    showMessage(Graphics2D) - Method in class main.Messages
    Draws the message panel on the screen if it is visible.
    showMessageForDuration(String) - Method in class main.Messages
    Shows the specified message for a limited duration.
    SpacePressed - Variable in class main.KeyHandler
     
    SpaceUsed - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    STALL_STATE - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    stallTileNum - Variable in class main.tile.TileManager
     
    stallTileSize - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    startCooking() - Method in class main.Cook
    Uses the canCook() method to check if the player has the ingredients needed to cook the item, if so it starts a new thread to handle the cooking process, simulates cooking using the thread sleep method and updates player inventory, adds the food and removes the ingredients.
    startGameThread() - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Starts the game thread.

    T

    takeFromPlayer(int, int) - Static method in class main.Inventory
    Takes items from the players inventory based on index, like raw meat is 0, buns are 1, etc.
    takeMoneyFromPlayer(double) - Static method in class main.Inventory
    Method that takes a certian amount of money from the player, used to take money when in the restock cart.
    tile - Variable in class main.tile.TileManager

    tileM - Variable in class main.Gamepanel

    tileSize - Variable in class main.Gamepanel
     
    toggle() - Method in class main.InformationPanel
    Toggles the visibility of the information panel.

    U

    upArrow - Variable in class main.KeyHandler
     
    update() - Method in class main.Gamepanel
    Updates the game state including the player, customers, inventory panel, information panel, level progression, and order board.

    Updates the visibility of the message based on its duration.
